title: Noam Elkies
text: Home * People * Noam Elkies Noam Elkies [1] [2] Noam David Elkies , an American chess player, composer of chess studies [3] , mathematician and professor at Department of Mathematics, Harvard University . His research interests covers combinatorial game theory , and he is renowned for his knowledge of the connections between mathematics and music as well as chess and mathematics.
